title: Task 1.5: Implement scenario_drop

title: FUNC-1: Implement delta_row_count in scenario_stats
description:
From Codex review: scenario_stats returns delta_row_count = 0 always.

Current code comment: 'TODO: count delta rows once delta tables exist'

Implementation needed:
1. Query all delta tables in scenario schema
2. SUM the row counts
3. Return actual count instead of 0

Affected code: src/scenario_manager.cpp ScenarioStatsFunction (lines 740-755)

Depends on: Delta tables being implemented (Task 2.0 complete)
close_reason: Implemented bind-time NULL validation with SPECIAL_HANDLING and delta_row_count in scenario_stats

close_reason: Implemented protocol_log_change function to append entries to the 'changes' section of a scenario's protocol. Creates audit trail of modifications with newline-separated entries. Added tests and documentation.

title: Task 2.9: Implement no-PK table handling
description: Tables without PK use all columns as composite key. Warn at scenario creation. Document duplicate row behavior. Source: delta_storage_engine.cpp. Test: scenario_no_pk.test

title: Task 1.2: Implement scenario_create (basic)

close_reason: Implemented scenario_create and scenario_drop as ScalarFunctions. All tests passing.

title: Task 2.2: Implement OptimizerExtension for write interception
description: Register pre_optimize_function to intercept LogicalInsert/Update/Delete on scenario schemas. Source: optimizer_extension.cpp/hpp. Test: scenario_write.test

title: TEST-1: Add SQL injection edge case tests
description:
From Codex review: Need tests verifying protection against SQL injection.

Test cases needed:
1. Scenario name with SQL metacharacters: "test'; DROP TABLE--"
2. Description with quotes and special chars
3. Table name validation in delta_create
4. Unicode and escape sequences

Expected behavior: All should either fail validation or be safely escaped.

Test file: test/sql/scenario_errors.test or new test/sql/scenario_security.test
close_reason: Implemented EscapeSQLString, QuoteIdentifier, and ValidateTableName helpers. Added security tests.

title: Task 2.10: Implement wrapper procedures (fallback)
description: scenario_insert, scenario_update, scenario_delete explicit procedures. Source: scenario_procedures.cpp. Test: scenario_write_explicit.test

title: Task 6.2: Implement rowid validation (scenario_validate)
description: Detect stale state after VACUUM. Warn if reorganized. Source: delta_storage_engine.cpp. Test: scenario_validation.test

title: TEST-2: Add bind-time error tests
description:
From Codex review: Verify bind functions properly validate at prepare time.

Test cases needed:
1. NULL scenario_name at bind time
2. Empty string scenario_name
3. Type mismatches (INTEGER where VARCHAR expected)
4. Verify errors happen at PREPARE not at EXECUTE

Test file: test/sql/scenario_errors.test
close_reason: Implemented bind-time NULL validation with SPECIAL_HANDLING and delta_row_count in scenario_stats

title: Task 5.3: Implement protocol_add_finding
description: Append to Findings section. Source: protocol_manager.cpp. Test: scenario_protocols.test

title: Task 6.3: Implement error message improvements
description: All errors include scenario name, indicate base vs delta, suggest remediation. Test: scenario_errors.test

title: SEC-3: Validate table_name in delta_create/delta_drop
description:
table_name parameter is passed without validation and used in identifier positions.

Affected locations:
- DeltaCreateBind (delta_storage_engine.cpp:140-161)
- DeltaDropBind (delta_storage_engine.cpp:219-237)
- CreateDeltaTable uses table_name in WHERE and CREATE TABLE

Risk: Malicious table_name with quotes or special chars could change query semantics.

Fix:
1. Add ValidateTableName() function similar to ValidateName()
2. Always quote identifiers: StringUtil::Format("\"%s\"", table_name)
3. Reject invalid table names at bind time

Test: delta_create('scenario', 'weird''name') should fail with clear error
close_reason: Implemented EscapeSQLString, QuoteIdentifier, and ValidateTableName helpers. Added security tests.

title: Task 4.4: Implement scenario_from_snapshot
description: Create scenario using snapshot as base. Comparisons default to snapshot. Source: snapshot_manager.cpp. Test: scenario_snapshots.test
close_reason: Implemented scenario_from_snapshot function to create scenarios from historical snapshots. New scenarios see snapshot data as baseline instead of main. Auto-creates delta tables and merge views for all tables in snapshot. Added comprehensive tests and documentation.

title: Task 2.0: Create delta table structure
description: Delta tables: _delta_<tablename> with _op (I/U/D), _ts, _version + all base columns. Source: delta_storage_engine.cpp/hpp. Test: scenario_write.test
close_reason: Implemented all functions, tests pass

close_reason: Implemented scenario_compare_all table function. Returns per-table summary: added_rows, removed_rows, changed_rows. Efficient counting from delta tables. Test coverage added.

title: Task 1.4: Implement scenario_list
description: Table function returning scenario metadata. Returns: name, schema_name, base_schema, base_captured_at, created_at, status, description. Order by created_at DESC. Source: scenario_manager.cpp. Test: scenario_lifecycle.test
close_reason: Implemented scenario_list as TableFunction. All tests passing.

title: SEC-2: Escape/validate description strings in scenario/snapshot create
description:
Descriptions are concatenated directly into SQL without escaping.

Affected locations:
- ScenarioCreateFunction (scenario_manager.cpp:176-181): desc_value = "'" + description + "'"
- SnapshotCreateFunction (snapshot_manager.cpp:149-154)

Risk: A description containing single quotes will break the statement or allow injection.

Fix options:
1. Use parameterized queries for INSERT statements
2. Add EscapeString helper function and use consistently
3. Validate descriptions don't contain dangerous characters

Test: scenario_create('test', 'O''Brien description') should work correctly
close_reason: Implemented EscapeSQLString, QuoteIdentifier, and ValidateTableName helpers. Added security tests.

title: Task 4.1: Implement snapshot_create
description: Create point-in-time snapshot. Read-only, uses COW. Creates protocol entry. Source: snapshot_manager.cpp/hpp. Test: scenario_snapshots.test
close_reason: Implemented by background agents

title: Task 2.4: Implement transparent UPDATE
description: UPDATE creates _op='U' entries for base rows, modifies existing delta rows. WHERE on logical view. Source: delta_storage_engine.cpp. Test: scenario_write.test
close_reason: Implemented using INSERT/INSERT OR REPLACE into delta tables. Merge views handle transparent read. Test coverage in scenario_write.test.

title: TEST-3: Add transaction partial failure tests
description:
From Codex review: Test behavior when operations fail mid-way.

Test cases needed:
1. scenario_create fails after schema created but before registry insert
2. scenario_branch fails after some but not all tables copied
3. scenario_drop when schema exists but registry entry missing

These tests may require injecting failures (e.g., invalid table that fails registration).

Test file: test/sql/scenario_errors.test

Current: Hard-coded '_scen_' prefix in GetSchemaPrefix()

Needed:
1. Add extension configuration parameter for custom prefix
2. Allow users to change prefix at runtime
3. Validate prefix doesn't conflict with existing schemas

From plan file: Task 1.9 - scenario_schema_prefix config

Affected code: src/scenario_manager.cpp GetSchemaPrefix function

title: SEC-1: Use parameterized queries for SQL injection prevention
description:
Replace string concatenation with parameterized queries in all SQL operations.

Affected locations:
- ScenarioManager::ScenarioExists (scenario_manager.cpp:42-45)
- SnapshotManager::ScenarioExists/SnapshotExists (snapshot_manager.cpp:31-40)
- ProtocolManager::ScenarioExists (protocol_manager.cpp:13-16)
- All WHERE clauses with user input

Pattern to use:
```cpp
con.Query("SELECT 1 FROM _scenario_registry WHERE scenario_name = ?", {Value(name)});
```

Priority: HIGH - Security vulnerability
close_reason: Implemented EscapeSQLString, QuoteIdentifier, and ValidateTableName helpers. Added security tests.

title: TXSAFE-2: Wrap scenario_branch in transaction
description:
scenario_branch performs multiple inserts (registry, tables, rowids) with manual cleanup on failure. Should use transaction for atomicity.

From Codex review:
- Current: Multiple INSERT statements with cleanup on error
- Issue: Partial state possible on mid-operation failure
- Solution: Wrap in BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK

Affected code: src/scenario_manager.cpp ScenarioBranchFunction (lines 481-559)
close_reason: Wrapped scenario_create, scenario_branch, and scenario_drop in BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK transactions with try-catch for atomic operations.

title: Task 4.6: Document Epic 4 functions in API_REFERENCE.md
description: Document all snapshot functions in docs/API_REFERENCE.md

title: Task 2.3: Implement transparent INSERT
description: INSERT INTO scenario.table redirects to delta with _op='I'. Support INSERT...SELECT and bulk. Source: delta_storage_engine.cpp. Test: scenario_write.test
close_reason: Implemented using INSERT/INSERT OR REPLACE into delta tables. Merge views handle transparent read. Test coverage in scenario_write.test.

title: TXSAFE-1: Wrap scenario_create in transaction
description:
scenario_create performs multiple operations (schema creation, registry insert, table registration, rowid capture). If any step fails, manual cleanup may leave partial state. Wrap all operations in a DuckDB transaction and use ROLLBACK on failure.

From Codex review:
- Current: Manual cleanup with try/catch
- Issue: Partial state if cleanup also fails
- Solution: Use transaction BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK

Affected code: src/scenario_manager.cpp ScenarioCreateFunction (lines 152-269)
close_reason: Wrapped scenario_create, scenario_branch, and scenario_drop in BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK transactions with try-catch for atomic operations.

title: Task 6.0: Performance validation spike
description: Validate merge-on-read overhead: <20% for 1% delta, <30% for 5% delta at 10M rows. Test: scenario_performance.test

title: Epic 3: Comparison Engine
close_reason: All comparison tasks complete: scenario_compare (2-arg and 3-arg), scenario_compare_all, branch origin comparison. Documentation task 3.4 remains.

title: PERF-1: Batch PK column queries
description:
From Codex review: ScenarioCreateFunction does N queries for N tables to get PK columns.

Current:
- For each table: query information_schema.columns
- For each table: query information_schema.key_column_usage
- O(n) queries for n tables

Optimization:
- Single query joining tables with information_schema
- Or use DuckDB catalog API directly

Affected code: src/scenario_manager.cpp ScenarioCreateFunction (lines 152-269)

Potential impact: Large schemas with many tables will see significant speedup.

title: Task 1.9: Implement scenario_schema_prefix config
description: SET scenario_schema_prefix = '_my_'. Default is '_scen_'. Session-scoped. scenario_list() shows both names. Source: extension config. Test: scenario_config.test

title: Task 3.4: Document Epic 3 functions in API_REFERENCE.md
description: Document all comparison functions in docs/API_REFERENCE.md

title: Task 1.7: Implement scenario_archive/unarchive
description: Archive sets status='archived', queryable but no writes. Unarchive restores active. Source: scenario_manager.cpp. Test: scenario_lifecycle.test
close_reason: Implemented all functions, tests pass

title: PERF-2: Deferred rowid capture option
description:
From Codex review: Capturing all rowids at scenario creation is expensive for large tables.

Current behavior:
- INSERT INTO _scenario_base_rowids SELECT rowid FROM table
- For millions of rows, this is slow and uses significant storage

Proposed enhancement:
- Add optional parameter: scenario_create('name', 'desc', lazy_rowids := true)
- When lazy_rowids=true, defer rowid capture until first delta operation
- Or implement query-time validation instead of stored rowids

This is an architectural decision that may need discussion.

Affected code: src/scenario_manager.cpp CaptureBaseRowIds

close_reason: Implemented snapshot_compare table function comparing current main state against snapshot. Snapshot now materializes the scenario's merged view (base + deltas) for accurate point-in-time comparison. Updated API_REFERENCE.md with comprehensive documentation.

description: DELETE creates _op='D' tombstones for base rows, removes inserted delta rows. Source: delta_storage_engine.cpp. Test: scenario_write.test
close_reason: Implemented using INSERT/INSERT OR REPLACE into delta tables. Merge views handle transparent read. Test coverage in scenario_write.test.

title: DRY-1: Consolidate BindData structs with template/inheritance
description:
From Codex review: Multiple similar *BindData structs could be consolidated.

Current structs:
- ScenarioCreateBindData
- ScenarioDropBindData
- ScenarioBranchBindData
- ScenarioArchiveBindData
- DeltaCreateBindData
- etc.

All share similar patterns (scenario_name, optional description).

Options:
1. Template with parameter variations
2. Base class with virtual methods
3. Accept current duplication as acceptable

This is a code quality improvement, not urgent.

Affected files:
- src/scenario_manager.cpp
- src/delta_storage_engine.cpp

description:
scenario_drop performs cascading deletes (rowids, tables, registry, schema). Should be atomic to prevent orphaned metadata.

From Codex review:
- Current: Sequential DELETEs then DROP SCHEMA
- Issue: Partial cleanup if operation fails mid-way
- Solution: Wrap in transaction

Affected code: src/scenario_manager.cpp ScenarioDropFunction (lines 294-342)
close_reason: Wrapped scenario_create, scenario_branch, and scenario_drop in BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK transactions with try-catch for atomic operations.

title: ERRH-1: Document error handling policy
description:
From Codex review: Inconsistent error handling patterns observed.

Current issues:
1. Some functions check HasError() and throw, others silently continue
2. CreateDeltaTable ignores index creation errors (best-effort)
3. No logging of non-fatal errors for debugging

Actions needed:
1. Document explicit policy: which errors are fatal vs best-effort
2. Add logging for best-effort operations that fail
3. Make error handling consistent across all functions

Affected files:
- src/scenario_manager.cpp
- src/delta_storage_engine.cpp
